AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A collection of points to be checked at a specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a group of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A collection of points to be checked at a specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a group of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Set
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the groups that are measured in the measure shift.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Critical
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates that the point is critical and/or mandatory

AD_FIELD.NAME: Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non-unique identifier for a record/document often used as a search tool.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A more descriptive identifier (that does need to be unique) of a record/document that is used as a default search option along with the search key (that is unique and mostly shorter). It is up to 60 characters in length.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Shift
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a time schedule in a shift of a critical control point group.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A collection of points to be checked at a specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a group of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Shift
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates a measure shift of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Date
AD_FIELD.HELP: Date when the measures are taken.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Text
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A place to add observations related to a specified check point.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Result of the measure in text format.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Processed
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A confirmation that the associated documents or requests are processed.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Processed checkbox indicates that a document has been processed.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Number of Measurements
AD_FIELD.HELP: Set the number of times that the point is measured each gathering.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Change to Complete pcc
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Change to Complete pcc

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Set
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the groups that are measured in the measure shift.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Shift
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates a measure shift of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Critical Control Point
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies each measured critical control point.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Time
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies the time of the data gathering.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Ending Time
AD_FIELD.HELP: End time in hours.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Time
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies the time of the data gathering.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Shift
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A partition of the workday into intervals.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the shift when the group is going to be measured. Available options are morning and swing shift

AD_FIELD.NAME: Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non-unique identifier for a record/document often used as a search tool.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A more descriptive identifier (that does need to be unique) of a record/document that is used as a default search option along with the search key (that is unique and mostly shorter). It is up to 60 characters in length.

AD_FIELD.NAME: User/Contact
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An acquaintance to reach for information related to the business partner.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The User identifies a unique user in the system. This could be an internal user or a business partner contact

AD_FIELD.NAME: Explode Measure Shift
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Explode Measure Shift
AD_FIELD.HELP: Explode Measure Shift

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A statement of worth or importance given in many forms.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Result of the measure in numeric format.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Values
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies each value measured in a measure time.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non-unique identifier for a record/document often used as a search tool.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A more descriptive identifier (that does need to be unique) of a record/document that is used as a default search option along with the search key (that is unique and mostly shorter). It is up to 60 characters in length.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Change to Cancelled PCC
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Change to Cancelled PCC

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Critical Control Point
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies each measured critical control point.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Check
AD_FIELD.HELP: Yes/No result of the measure.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Document
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The specific document type which should be used for the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Specifies document subtype (eg. POS Order, Return Material, etc.) that each document (such as Sales Invoice, Purchase Order, etc.). Various document subtypes usually differ on the consequences they have. You can convert document types (e.g. from Offer to Order). The conversion is then reflected in the current type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Starting Time
AD_FIELD.HELP: Start time in hours.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value Type
AD_FIELD.HELP: Set the value type expected for the point. Possible options are: Yes/No, String or Number.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Document
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The specific document type which should be used for the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Specifies document subtype (eg. POS Order, Return Material, etc.) that each document (such as Sales Invoice, Purchase Order, etc.). Various document subtypes usually differ on the consequences they have. You can convert document types (e.g. from Offer to Order). The conversion is then reflected in the current type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value Type
AD_FIELD.HELP: Set the value type expected for the point. Possible options are: Yes/No, String or Number.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Comments
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Observations occurred during the process or operation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Frequency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of times something occurs during a time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Time period between measure gathering.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Measurement Hour
AD_FIELD.HELP: Time when the gathering was made.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Shift
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A partition of the workday into intervals.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the shift when the group is going to be measured. Available options are morning and swing shift

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A collection of points to be checked at a specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a group of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quality Control Point Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A collection of points to be checked at a specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a group of critical control points.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Input Time Measurement
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: With this process are inserted all the Control Points of the selected group to fill with taken measurements.
AD_FIELD.HELP: With this process are inserted all the Control Points of the selected group to fill with taken measurements.
